prompt: Create a photorealistic full-body portrait of an adult East Asian woman in her mid 20s sitting on the edge of a dark wooden outdoor deck in front of large black-framed glass patio doors. She has long straight dark brown hair parted slightly to one side, natural makeup, small earrings, and a gentle relaxed smile while looking directly at the camera. She wears a fitted short-sleeve pale pink high-neck mini dress, a delicate bracelet, and no shoes; her bare feet rest on the deck, her legs are crossed at the knees, and her hands are folded neatly on her lap. The setting is a modern café or cabin terrace with warm wooden benches and tables visible through and beside the glass, a folded cream bag or cloth on a wooden bench to the right, and soft greenery reflected in the windows. Use natural daylight, soft diffused lighting, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, accurate anatomy, elegant casual posing, warm wood tones, and a high-resolution DSLR portrait look. Vertical composition, eye-level camera, 3/4 seated pose, subject centered slightly right, calm lifestyle fashion photography mood. Avoid text, watermark, extra limbs, distorted hands or feet, heavy retouching, cartoon style, or overly dramatic lighting.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic full-body portrait of an adult East Asian woman in her mid 20s sitting on the edge of a dark wooden outdoor deck in front of large black-framed glass patio doors. She has long straight dark brown hair parted slightly to one side, natural makeup, small earrings, and a gentle relaxed smile while looking directly at the camera. She wears a fitted short-sleeve pale pink high-neck mini dress, a delicate bracelet, and no shoes; her bare feet rest on the deck, her legs are crossed at the knees, and her hands are folded neatly on her lap. The setting is a modern café or cabin terrace with warm wooden benches and tables visible through and beside the glass, a folded cream bag or cloth on a wooden bench to the right, and soft greenery reflected in the windows. Use natural daylight, soft diffused lighting, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, accurate anatomy, elegant casual posing, warm wood tones, and a high-resolution DSLR portrait look. Vertical composition, eye-level camera, 3/4 seated pose, subject centered slightly right, calm lifestyle fashion photography mood. Avoid text, watermark, extra limbs, distorted hands or feet, heavy retouching, cartoon style, or overly dramatic lighting.
promptZh: 创作一张写实的全身生活方式肖像，拍摄一位年轻的东亚女性，她坐在现代住宅外的木质露台边缘，背景是带有深色边框的大型玻璃推拉门。她拥有 一头深棕色长发，皮肤白皙细腻，妆容自然清透，佩戴小巧耳环，面带温柔放松的微笑，直视镜头。她身穿一件修身的淡粉色短袖迷你裙，圆领设计，简约优雅，并佩戴着精致的手链。姿势设定为坐姿，双手叠放在膝盖上，双腿交叉向前伸展，赤脚，姿态从容优雅。场景包括暖棕色的木质地板，右侧设有一个木凳或矮桌，上面放着一个米色的包或布料，透过玻璃可以看到隐约的室内家具，窗户上倒映着柔和的绿植。采用自然日光，浅景深，柔和的背景虚化，写实的皮肤纹理，平衡且美观的构图，竖版肖像构图，高分辨率摄影风格，无文字，无水印，无夸张的解剖结构。
